title: Optional Second Column Header
excerpt: This would be a really cool feature to have an over arching column header that spans X number of columns, so you could indicate that this was “Phase 1” for example with the columns sitting underneath it.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a really cool feature to have an over arching column header that spans X number of columns, so you could indicate that this was “Phase 1” for example with the columns sitting underneath it.
